creator: greenreaper@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 178084
Failed build output

I just attempted to portupgrade curl on FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p34 amd64.
This pulled in the new libnghttp2, but the build froze at the line:

> ....
> Making all in contrib
> rm -f nghttpx-init nghttpx-init.tmp
> sed -e 's|@bindir[@]|/usr/local/bin|g'  > nghttpx-init.tmp

There's a missing filename there, which should probably be nghttpx-init.in
Not sure why. I had to Ctrl-C out of it.

I'm using clang39 in make.conf, but it failed in the same way when I moved back to clang.

---

In case it matters, curl is broken on the system - trying to use it, I get:
> Shared object "libpsl.so.6" not found, required by "libcurl.so.4"
When I rebuild libpsl port it seems to generate libpsl.so.5.1.0.
I figure this would be resolved by rebuilding the upgraded curl against it.
